Variables.Name: bGenerateLightMapUV
Variables.Description: Whether to generate lightmap UVs for a merged mesh

Variables.Name: bComputedLightMapResolution
Variables.Description: Whether or not the lightmap resolution should be computed by summing the lightmap resolutions for the input Mesh Components

Variables.Name: bImportVertexColors_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether we should import vertex colors into merged mesh

Variables.Name: bPivotPointAtZero
Variables.Description: Whether merged mesh should have pivot at world origin, or at first merged component otherwise

Variables.Name: TargetLightMapResolution
Variables.Description: Target lightmap resolution

Variables.Name: bMergePhysicsData
Variables.Description: Whether to merge physics data (collision primitives)

Variables.Name: bMergeMaterials
Variables.Description: Whether to merge source materials into one flat material, ONLY available when merging a single LOD level, see LODSelectionType

Variables.Name: MaterialSettings
Variables.Description: Material simplification

Variables.Name: bBakeVertexDataToMesh
Variables.Description: Whether or not vertex data such as vertex colours should be baked into the resulting mesh

Variables.Name: bUseVertexDataForBakingMaterial
Variables.Description: Whether or not vertex data such as vertex colours should be used when baking out materials

Variables.Name: bReuseMeshLightmapUVs
Variables.Description: Whether to attempt to re-use the source mesh's lightmap UVs when baking the material or always generate a new set.

Variables.Name: bMergeEquivalentMaterials
Variables.Description: Whether to attempt to merge materials that are deemed equivalent. This can cause artifacts in the merged mesh if world positionactor position etc. is used to determine output color.

Variables.Name: OutputUVs
Variables.Description: Whether to output the specified UV channels into the merged mesh (only if the source meshes contain valid UVs for the specified channel)

Variables.Name: GutterSize
Variables.Description:
Whether to output the specified UV channels into the merged mesh (only if the source meshes contain valid UVs for the specified channel) 
	 The gutter (in texels) to add to each sub-chart for our baked-out material for the top mip level

Variables.Name: bUseLandscapeCulling
Variables.Description: Whether or not to use available landscape geometry to cull away invisible triangles

Variables.Name: bAllowDistanceField
Variables.Description: Whether to allow distance field to be computed for this mesh. Disable this to save memory if the merged mesh will only be rendered in the distance.

Variables.Name: bExportNormalMap_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether to export normal maps for material merging

Variables.Name: bExportMetallicMap_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether to export metallic maps for material merging

Variables.Name: bExportRoughnessMap_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether to export roughness maps for material merging

Variables.Name: bExportSpecularMap_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether to export specular maps for material merging

Variables.Name: MergedMaterialAtlasResolution_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Merged material texture atlas resolution
